data.summary: Drafting handoff email from Heman Bhullar to Sara Patel with key account details.

steps.result: 12 accounts, $1.42M LTV, 8 open quotes, 5 active tasks
Top: Acme (VIP, 2 quotes), Pacific (override pending), Riverstone (credit increase)
Draft ready — internal handoff tone, 6 sentences

fields.label: Body
fields.value:
Hi Sara,

Welcome to the West Coast book — handing over 12 accounts ($1.42M combined LTV, $284K in open quotes) effective May 15. A few flagged for early attention:

• Acme Corp (C-4201) — VIP, $482K LTV, 2 open quotes. Rachel Chen is the main contact; she's responsive but expects fast turnaround.
• Pacific Goods (C-3318) — $312K LTV, discount override pending approval. Worth a call this week before they push back on terms.
• Riverstone LLC (C-2944) — $186K LTV, credit limit increase pending with finance.

Full account book + open tasks are in the CRM under your queue. Happy to do a 30-min walkthrough before May 15 — let me know what works.

Thanks,
Heman

closingText.text: Handoff email drafted — covers the priority accounts and pending items Sara should know before May 15. Want me to make it shorter, add specific quote IDs, or send it?
